_comment: Scenario 18: Perception-Driven Obstacle Avoidance — no HD-map, D* Lite dynamic layer only

scenario.name: perception_avoidance
scenario.description: Navigate through an obstacle field using ONLY camera-detected obstacles — no static HD-map. The color_contour detector finds obstacles, ByteTrack maintains tracks, UKF fuses depth estimates, and D* Lite replans dynamically via update_from_objects(). Validates the full perception→planning loop for unknown environments. ObstacleAvoider3D is minimized so D* Lite is the primary avoidance mechanism.

obstacle_avoidance._comment: Minimized reactive avoidance — D* Lite dynamic layer is primary

occupancy_grid._comment: 3s TTL keeps detected obstacles in the grid long enough for replanning

mission_planner._comment_static_obstacles: Empty — no HD-map. All obstacle knowledge comes from camera detections at runtime.

geofence._comment: Geofence disabled — D* Lite replanning may push drone toward boundary when avoiding detected obstacles

waypoints._comment: Toward RED box Gz(7,1)=our(1,7) h=5m — must detect and avoid
Toward YELLOW box Gz(15,7)=our(7,15) h=4m — must detect and avoid
Toward GREEN cyl Gz(8,8)=our(8,8) h=5m — must detect and avoid
Toward ORANGE box Gz(4,4)=our(4,4) h=3m — drone at z=4 may fly over

tracker._comment: ByteTrack two-stage association for robust obstacle tracking

radar._comment: Camera-only perception — radar disabled to isolate vision-based avoidance
